name: MountTarget
description: MountTarget schema from Amazon EFS Amazon Elastic File System (EFS) API

FileSystemId.description: The ID of the file system for which the mount target is intended.

LifeCycleState.description: Lifecycle state of the mount target.

IpAddress.description: Address at which the file system is mountable.

NetworkInterfaceId.description: The ID of the network interface.

AvailabilityZoneId.description: The unique and consistent identifier of the Availability Zone.

AvailabilityZoneName.description: The name of the Availability Zone.
